# Mkweli AML
> Free offline sanctions screening app for financial institutions.

## Site
- Homepage: https://mkweli.tech/
- Contact: gilbert@mkweli.tech
- APK: https://mkweli.tech/Mkweli_v1.0.8.apk

## Product
Mkweli AML screens names against OFAC SDN, UN Security Council, EU financial sanctions and UK FCDO lists on-device, with offline support and EN/FR/PT/ES languages. Free for banks, remittance firms, MSBs and compliance teams.

## Related
- Sister product LakazAgri (Mauritius agri): https://lakazagri.mu/
